10606753.title: Doctor in the House
10606753.description: The doctor is called in to help 48-year-old Priti, a working mother who is struggling with multiple problems including stress, headaches, weight gain and disrupted sleep.

10552039.title: Doctor in the House
10552039.description: The doctor is called upon to get to the bottom of Ray's back pain. He's been suffering for decades even though he looks fit and runs his own gym.
